case_title: HEM DISTRIBUTING CO. INC. VS. ADEL METRY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-12-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT METRY, ADEL DBA ADEL METRY ENTERPRISES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEM DISTRIBUTING CO. INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT METRY, ADEL DBA ADEL METRY ENTERPRISES $2,603.06 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,713.06, THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED INDICATES THAT DEFENDANT WAS CREDITED FOR HIS PREVIOUS PAYMENTS ON ACCOUNT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HEM DISTRIBUTING CO. INC.

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,603.06 FILED BY HEM DISTRIBUTING CO. INC. AS TO DEFENDANT METRY, ADEL DBA ADEL METRY ENTERPRISES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-16-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT METRY, ADEL DBA ADEL METRY ENTERPRISES
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-16-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-16-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
